name: 007 Story Mode Demo - Talk and Mount
goalText: Test Story Mode action-to-talk and action-to-enter-mech without starting combat.

maps.name: 007 Story Mode Demo - Talk and Mount
maps.objectiveSummary: Talk to Gabe, then mount Skye's Telum

briefing.title: Story Mode Demo - Talk and Mount
briefing.text: Free-walk test map. Move with WASD/arrows. Walk Skye up to Gabe and press Action/Enter to start dialogue. After Gabe says the mech is ready, walk to the rear hatch of Skye's Telum and press Action/Enter to mount up and complete the mission.
objectives: Walk to the rear hatch and press Action/Enter to enter the Telum.

objectives.label: Talk to Gabe, then mount Skye's Telum
objectives.briefingText: Talk to Gabe with Action, then walk to the rear hatch and press Action to enter the Telum.

lines.name: Story Mode Demo
lines.text: Story map loaded. No rounds, no initiative, no Start Combat prompt. Walk Skye to Gabe and press Action/Enter.

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: Morning, Vey. The mech is ready.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: I can barely breathe without my ribs filing a complaint.

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: Then keep the breathing efficient. Mount up.

lines.name: Story Mode Demo
lines.text: Victory. Story Mode action dialogue and action-to-enter-mech both resolved without combat.

lines.name: Story Mode Demo
lines.text: Defeat path is available, but this demo should not use it.

victory.title: Story Demo Complete
victory.text: Skye talked to Gabe, mounted the Telum with the Action button, and completed the story map without combat.
